_note: PR #27 duplicate-column flat disambiguation. Four anonymized synthetic fixtures: (a) variant column-window with byte-identical numeric tokens AND no flat context → all rejected (gap_reason='duplicate_column_flat_rejected'); (b) variant column-window with byte-identical numeric tokens AND explicit '(유지)' / '(변동 없음)' context → admitted (legitimate flat revision); (c) PR #12 arrow-pair flat (`<metric> X → X`) — different code path, byte-identical to PR #12 broker_b_op_only_up_sales_flat behavior; (d) mixed: sales rejected as dup-column, op/eps survive, primary=op.
